title: coreopsis arizonica
intro: Coreopsis arizonica, also known as Arizona tickseed, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis arizonica include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
